title: Secondly, by virtue of Section 5(b) of the Act of 1978 the AFP is deprived of immunity, because the proceedings before Potts J were in respect of damage or loss of tangible property caused by an act or omission in the United Kingdom.

evidence.clean_text: Secondly, by virtue of Section 5(b) of the Act of 1978 the AFP is deprived of immunity, because the proceedings before Potts J were in respect of damage or loss of tangible property caused by an act or omission in the United Kingdom. The property is said to be seized documents. I would not have upheld Mr Pleming's argument on this ground.
